title: matelea mutisiana
intro: Matelea mutisiana, also known as the "Butterfly Pea Vine," is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to alleviate symptoms of fever, coughs, and respiratory issues. The plant's extracts have been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, contributing to its potential health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. Matelea mutisiana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, colds, and respiratory infections.
